mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT count(1) FROM sys_user t where t.deleted = 0) AS allUserCount, (SELECT count(1) FROM gpt_user t where t.deleted = 0) AS allGptUserCount, (SELECT count(1) FROM gpt_assistant_type t WHERE t.deleted = 0) AS allAssistantCount, (SELECT count(1) FROM sys_dept t where t.deleted = 0) AS allDeptCount, (SELECT count(1) FROM sys_role t WHERE t.deleted = 0) AS allRoleCount, (SELECT count(1) FROM sys_log t WHERE t.deleted = 0) AS allAccessCount, (SELECT count(1) FROM sys_dict t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.dict_type = 'gpt_model_type') AS allModelCount, (SELECT count(1) FROM sys_job t WHERE t.deleted = 0) AS allJobCount
SELECT count(1) AS allModelCount FROM sys_dict_data t WHERE t.status = 0 AND t.dict_type = 'gpt_model_type'

SELECT ifnull(SUM(q.a), 0) as a, ifnull(SUM(q.b), 0) as b, ifnull(SUM(q.c), 0) as c, ifnull(SUM(q.d), 0) as d, ifnull(SUM(q.e), 0) as e, ifnull(SUM(q.f), 0) as f FROM (SELECT (CASE WHEN t.model = 'CHAT_GPT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as a, (CASE WHEN t.model = 'WENXIN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as b, (CASE WHEN t.model = 'ZHIPU' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as c, (CASE WHEN t.model = 'QIANWEN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as d, (CASE WHEN t.model = 'SPARK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as e, (CASE WHEN t.model = 'MOONSHOT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as f FROM gpt_chat_message t) as q
